summary:
Claim: Annealing is a thermal treatment used to relieve internal stresses and soften materials.  
Evidence: - It reduces dislocation density in metal structures, improving ductility and machinability. - Commonly applied in manufacturing to enhance tool performance and part durability.  
Answer: D
